name: GenderOption
description: Implementation of the 'GenderOption' model. A gender option available at a site

Id.description: The id of the gender option.

Name.description: The value that describes this gender option.

IsActive.description: When `true`, this indicates that the gender option is active and may be assigned to a client.

IsDefault.description: When true, this indicates that this is the default gender option at the site.
